introSection: Ladybird is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lightwater Valley in Ripon, North Yorkshire, England, UK. It opened in 1993.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On 5 June 2012, a five-year-old girl was injured when she put her foot outside the train, allowing it to get trapped between the train and the station platform. Following the incident, the right-hand exit of each car was filled in.

fullText:
Ladybird is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lightwater Valley in Ripon, North Yorkshire, England, UK. It opened in 1993.



Green track and supports.



On 5 June 2012, a five-year-old girl was injured when she put her foot outside the train, allowing it to get trapped between the train and the station platform. Following the incident, the right-hand exit of each car was filled in.
